mapper.sql: SELECT TBCT.ID, TBCT.TRANSFER_DATE, TBCT.CARGO_INFO_ID_SOURCE, TBCT.CARGO_INFO_ID_TARGET, TBCT.QUANTITY, TBCT.TON, TBCT.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBCT.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCT.CARGO_AGENT_ID, TBCT.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TBCT.STORAGE_DATE, TBCT.STATUS, TBCT.REMARK, TBCT.CREATE_BY, TBCT.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBCT.CREATE_TIME, TBCT.UPDATE_BY, TBCT.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBCT.UPDATE_TIME, TBCT.IS_BILLING, TBCT.PAYMENT_CUSTOMER_ID, TBCT.PAYMENT_CUSTOMER_NAME, SOURCE.CARGO_INFO_NO AS SOURCE_CARGO_INFO_NO, TARGET.CARGO_INFO_NO AS TARGET_CARGO_INFO_NO FROM T_BUS_CARGO_TRANSFER TBCT LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO SOURCE ON TBCT.CARGO_INFO_ID_SOURCE = SOURCE.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TARGET ON TBCT.CARGO_INFO_ID_TARGET = TARGET.ID WHERE TBCT.CARGO_INFO_ID_SOURCE = #{cargoInfoId} OR TBCT.CARGO_INFO_ID_TARGET = #{cargoInfoId}
mapper.select:
SELECT CT.ID, CT.TRANSFER_DATE, CT.CARGO_INFO_ID_SOURCE, CT.CARGO_INFO_ID_TARGET, CT.QUANTITY, CT.TON, CT.CARGO_OWNER_ID, CT.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CT.CARGO_AGENT_ID, CT.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CT.STORAGE_DATE, CT.STATUS, CT.REMARK, CT.CREATE_BY, CT.CREATE_BY_NAME, CT.CREATE_TIME, CT.UPDATE_BY, CT.UPDATE_BY_NAME, CT.UPDATE_TIME, CT.IS_BILLING, CT.PAYMENT_CUSTOMER_ID, CT.PAYMENT_CUSTOMER_NAME, CT.CARGO_SOURCE, CI1.SHIP_NAME, CI1.CARGO_NAME, CI1.TRADE_TYPE, CI1.PACKING_NAME,
CI1.CARGO_OWNER_ID CARGO_OWNER_ID_SOURCE, CI1.CARGO_OWNER_NAME CARGO_OWNER_NAME_SOURCE, CI1.CARGO_AGENT_ID CARGO_AGENT_ID_SOURCE, CI1.CARGO_AGENT_NAME CARGO_AGENT_NAME_SOURCE, CI1.COMPANY_ID, CI1.COMPANY_NAME,
CI2.CARGO_OWNER_ID CARGO_OWNER_ID_TARGET, CI2.CARGO_OWNER_NAME CARGO_OWNER_NAME_TARGET, CI2.CARGO_AGENT_ID CARGO_AGENT_ID_TARGET, CI2.CARGO_AGENT_NAME CARGO_AGENT_NAME_TARGET FROM T_BUS_CARGO_TRANSFER CT LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO CI1 ON CI1.ID = CT.CARGO_INFO_ID_SOURCE LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO CI2 ON CI2.ID = CT.CARGO_INFO_ID_TARGET
CT.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CARGO_TRANSFER( ID, TRANSFER_DATE, CARGO_INFO_ID_SOURCE, CARGO_INFO_ID_TARGET, QUANTITY, TON, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, STORAGE_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, IS_BILLING, PAYMENT_CUSTOMER_ID, PAYMENT_CUSTOMER_NAME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{transferDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{cargoInfoIdSource, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoInfoIdTarget, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{quantity, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoAgentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{isBilling, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentCustomerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{paymentCustomerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_TRANSFER SET TRANSFER_DATE = #{transferDate,jdbcType=DATE}, CARGO_INFO_ID_SOURCE = #{cargoInfoIdSource,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_INFO_ID_TARGET = #{cargoInfoIdTarget,jdbcType=BIGINT}, QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TON = #{ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CARGO_OWNER_ID = #{cargoOwnerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_OWNER_NAME = #{cargoOwnerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_AGENT_ID = #{cargoAgentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_AGENT_NAME = #{cargoAgentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STORAGE_DATE = #{storageDate,jdbcType=DATE}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, IS_BILLING = #{isBilling, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_CUSTOMER_ID = #{paymentCustomerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, PAYMENT_CUSTOMER_NAME = #{paymentCustomerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_TRANSFER SET YARD_APPROVAL_BY = #{yardApprovalBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, YARD_APPROVAL_BY_NAME = #{yardApprovalByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, YARD_APPROVAL_TIME = #{yardApprovalTime,jdbcType=DATE}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_TRANSFER SET
TRANSFER_DATE = #{transferDate,jdbcType=DATE},
CARGO_INFO_ID_SOURCE = #{cargoInfoIdSource,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CARGO_INFO_ID_TARGET = #{cargoInfoIdTarget,jdbcType=BIGINT},
QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TON = #{ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CARGO_OWNER_ID = #{cargoOwnerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CARGO_OWNER_NAME = #{cargoOwnerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_AGENT_ID = #{cargoAgentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CARGO_AGENT_NAME = #{cargoAgentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STORAGE_DATE = #{storageDate,jdbcType=DATE},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT TBCC.COMPANY_ID,TBC.CUSTOMER_ID,TBCR.CARGO_CODE,TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBC.START_TIME,TBC.END_TIME,TBCR.CREATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR INNER JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TBCR.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID INNER JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC ON TBC.ID = TBCC.CONTRACT_ID
TBC.STATUS = '20' AND TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS IS NOT NULL AND TBC.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND TBCC.COMPANY_ID = #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND TBCR.CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TO_DATE(#{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= TBC.START_TIME AND TO_DATE(#{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') <= TBC.END_TIME
ORDER BY TBCR.CREATE_TIME DESC

select TBT.ID from T_BUS_TRUST TBT left join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC on TBT.ID = TBTC.TRUST_ID left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI on TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID WHERE TBCI.ID IN( select CARGO_INFO_ID_TARGET from T_BUS_CARGO_TRANSFER WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
